title: Psychox
description: mods that change your world and also Improve your graphics and performance with this simple modpack
body:
Performance
Psychox Modpack is faster than competing game clients, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. The bundled mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.

Feels familiar
Psychox Modpack includes features that allow you to experience Minecraft just as you remember it, no matter what version you've used before. This means you can use game controllers, play local worlds with friends, view advancements in a large window, and much more

Built on Fabric
Psychox Modpack uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods. You can use the modpack as a base to add your favorite mods to.

Open development
Psychox Modpack is open-source, and so are most of its mods. We welcome user suggestions and collaborate with mod developers to create a better user experience for everyone.
